ticket_goal: UX: Reorganize Settings Page with Tabbed Interface

TECHNICAL_SPECS.advocate: Moving connection details into an 'Enabled' state makes the UI cleaner and reduces cognitive load.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.skeptic: Hiding connection status increases clicks. Risk: Users forget why a platform is 'on'.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.synthesis: Implement Progressive Disclosure for configuration. Header displays name/toggle/active-status-indicator. Once enabled, Accordion expands to show BOTH 'Connections' and 'BYOK'.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.strategic_importance: Required for a polished UI as platforms grow.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.dependency_impact: Requires modification of PlatformCard.tsx and SettingsContent.tsx.

indicators: Connection status visible via indicator in header.

fixes_applied: Updated PLATFORMS constants with status field.
Refactored SettingsContent to handle active/coming-soon categories.
Added Coming Soon UI variant with grayscale and disabled state.

expected_output.notes: Code audit complete. Build passed. 50-line rule flagged for SettingsContent.tsx.

verification: Manual tests cover new tabbed interface
